texto: He saw Hercules in the movie theater time after time, hour after hour, examining Park, judging him, admiring him, and, ultimately, promising himself that one day he, Arnold Schwarzenegger, then thirteen years old and poor as he was, would be like him, would even surpass Reg Park.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Wendy Leigh: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “He saw Hercules in the movie theater time after time, hour after hour, examining Park, judging hi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, determination, after pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de estudos e reflexao.
